reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that travelers aren't allowed to use the restroom if they haven't filled up with gas.

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio que no se puede acceder al baño gratuito. La empleada del kiosco no te deja pasar si no pagas $200 ...o consumir algo en el local. Ya había cargado combustible y lo mismo tuve que hacer una compra para poder usar el baño. Es de sinvergüenzas lo que hacen

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station where you can't access the free restroom. The kiosk employee won't let you in unless you pay $200...or buy anything on the premises. I'd already filled up with gas, but I still had to make a purchase to use the restroom. What they do is shameless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNE82ZXpBRRAB
